Let $\mathbb{C}$ denote the complex numbers and let $M_3 (\mathbb{C})$ denote
the 3 by 3 matrices with entries in $\mathbb{C}$. Suppose $A, B \in M_3
(\mathbb{C})$, $B \neq 0$, and $AB = 0$ (where $0$ denotes the 3 by 3 matrix with
all entries zero). Prove that there exists $0 \neq D \in M_3 (\mathbb{C})$ such
that $AD = DA = 0$.
